page.title: osteoarthritis — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for osteoarthritis: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for osteoarthritis: 128 alterations and 302 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

alterations.name: ANKFN1
alterations.definition: ankyrin repeat and fibronectin type III domain containing 1

Change From Baseline OA Function in the Target Knee
Change from baseline activity pain score at 1-months, 3-months and 6-months
Evaluation of FFOCT reconstructions in early osteoarthritis evaluation using visual quantitative information parameter.
FURIN
alterations.definition: furin, paired basic amino acid cleaving enzyme

alterations.name: Global Pain Severity-Graded Chronic Pain Scale

Knee Injury and Osteoarthritis Outcome score- (KOOS Score)

alterations.definition: leucine rich repeats and immunoglobulin like domains 3

alterations.definition: nuclear receptor subfamily 3 group C member 1

alterations.definition: transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily V member 1

clinical status with the Oxford Knee Score
